name: Vox Editorial
description: Modern Vox-style editorial collage. Keeps the classic cream parchment background and blue accents but allows for modern color subjects, cutouts, and bold typography.
prompt_template: 9:16 portrait canvas 1080x1920px, Vox-style documentary video edit aesthetic, aged cream parchment background (#e8e4dc), full-canvas subtle hand-drawn pencil graph grid overlay at 45% opacity, high-quality detailed {subject} featured as a clean digital cutout with sharp edges, three gestural wide flat paintbrush swipes in muted steel blue (#8bafc4) at 80% opacity layered around the subject, {text_section}modern infographics aesthetic, high contrast, clean premium documentary look, no clutter
text_section_template: bold modern sans-serif typography (Montserrat style) reading '{text_overlay}' in dark charcoal (#1a1a1a) with a subtle yellow highlight box behind it,

image_style.overall_style: Vox-style video edit / modern documentary collage

background.grid_overlay: thin pencil graph paper grid at 45% opacity

main_photo.subject: {{SUBJECT_DESCRIPTION}}
main_photo.style: clean digital cutout / paper cutout look
main_photo.outline: optional subtle white stroke or drop shadow for depth

brush_strokes.style: loose gestural swipes, layered for depth

accent_elements.annotations: subtle dotted lines, arrows, or small circular magnifiers if the subject is complex

typography.background_highlight: muted yellow (#f2d06b) rectangular box at 90% opacity
